title: 2023年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What do you want for breakfast?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Would you like cheese on them?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「チーズは？」に1の「はい、お願い」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「はい」→正解。2「卵嫌い」→卵を頼んだ。3「私のじゃない」→無関係。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「鉛筆がない」に3の「はい、これ使って」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「緑色」→無関係。2「ペンが必要」→先生の返答でない。3「これ使って」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Could you answer the last question?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「最後の問題答えられた？」に3の「難しすぎた」が適切。
highlights: Could you answer the last question
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「音楽の後」→無関係。2「ロッカーの中」→無関係。3「難しすぎた」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you have a good vacation?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どこに行った？」に2の「山に」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2週間」→場所を聞いている。2「山に」→正解。3「家族と」→場所を聞いている。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「暑い、のどが渇いた」に1の「休憩しよう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「休憩しよう」→正解。2「宿題終わった」→無関係。3「ペン見つける」→無関係。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ買った？」に1の「先週末」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「先週末」→正解。2「好きなスポーツ」→時を聞いている。3「50ドル」→値段。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you going to the park, Lisa?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Yes, I did it this morning.
questions.explanation: 「宿題終わった？」に2の「今朝やった」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「そこで見た」→無関係。2「今朝やった」→正解。3「今日開いてる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Have some cookies. I made them this afternoon.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「クッキー食べて」に2の「おいしそう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「その店知ってる」→手作り。2「おいしそう」→正解。3「弁当箱の中」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you enjoy your summer vacation?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. How long did you stay there?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どのくらいいた？」に2の「1週間」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「兄弟と」→期間を聞いている。2「1週間」→正解。3「ロンドンで」→場所。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. How did you come here?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どうやって来た？」に3の「バスで」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「悪くない」→手段を聞いている。2「約10分」→手段を聞いている。3「バスで」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's raining. Where's your umbrella, Jill?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. I'll get a towel for you.

questions.question: Where is Jill's umbrella?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家」→学校。2「学校」→正解。3「車の中」→言及なし。4「カバンの中」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: There's a new student in my class.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I know. She joined the school band.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「音楽コンテスト」→新しい生徒。2「新しい先生」→生徒。3「バンドコンサート」→バンドに入った。4「新しい生徒」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You should put on a sweater.

questions.question: What will Johnny do?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「外に出る」→セーター着る。2「温かい飲み物」→セーター。3「ジャケット脱ぐ」→寒い。4「セーターを着る」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me, is there a convenience store near here?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, there's one next to the library.

questions.question: What is the woman looking for?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「コンビニ」→正解。2「図書館」→隣にある。3「レストラン」→言及なし。4「本屋」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. I want to sleep a little.

questions.question: What will the girl do next?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「トランプ」→断られた。2「昼寝」→おじいちゃん。3「外に行く」→正解。4「テレビ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where's the bus? It usually comes at 7:15.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's 7:30 now. We'll be late for school.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's a nice notebook! I like the picture of a bike on it.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks. I want to use it now, but I forgot my pencil.

questions.question: What will the girl borrow?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ノート」→鉛筆。2「鉛筆」→正解。3「自転車」→ノートの絵。4「消しゴム」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did that happen at tennis practice?

questions.question: What is Jimmy's problem?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ラケットを壊した」→正解。2「カバンをなくした」→ラケット。3「練習に遅れた」→壊した。4「手を怪我」→ラケット壊した。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you go to the festival this weekend?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, on Saturday, but I have to study on Sunday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I have a test on Monday.

questions.question: When will the girl go to the festival?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「金曜」→土曜。2「日曜」→勉強。3「土曜」→正解。4「月曜」→テスト。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What time do you leave your house for school?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Wow! That's late. I leave at 7:45.

questions.question: Who leaves for school at 7:45?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「男の子」→正解。2「女の子」→8:15。3「女の子の姉妹」→7:30。4「男の子の姉妹」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thank you for shopping at Jackson's. Today, all bicycles are 20 percent off. We'll also check bike tires for free.

questions.question: Where is the man talking?
questions.explanation: 「ジャクソンズでお買い物ありがとう」→店。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→店。2「レストラン」→店。3「博物館」→店。4「店」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My dad usually gives me money or a DVD for my birthday. This year, he gave me a beautiful dress. I was really surprised.

questions.question: Why was the girl surprised?
questions.explanation: 「今年はドレスをもらった」→驚いた。
highlights: he gave me a beautiful dress
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ドレスをもらった」→正解。2「お金」→いつもの。3「DVD」→いつもの。4「本」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Bob usually rides his bike to school. But today it was raining, so he walked. After school, he took the bus home.

questions.question: How did Bob go to school today?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車」→いつもは。2「車」→言及なし。3「バス」→帰り。4「歩いた」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I like to draw pictures. Next month, I'll enter an art contest. I want to win a prize.

questions.question: What will the girl do next month?
questions.explanation: 「来月、美術コンテストに出る」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「美術コンテスト」→正解。2「学校で絵を描く」→コンテスト。3「画材を買う」→言及なし。4「美術館」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Cooking is fun. I'm in the cooking club at school. This Saturday, I'll cook dinner for my family.

questions.question: What will the boy do this Saturday?
highlights: I'll cook dinner for my family
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「夕食を作る」→正解。2「学校に行く」→料理部。3「クラブに入る」→もう入ってる。4「レストランで食事」→家で作る。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm in a band with my friends. Matt and Alice both play the guitar, and Ed plays the piano. Olivia and I are the singers. Our band practices are really fun.

questions.question: Who plays the piano?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「マット」→ギター。2「アリス」→ギター。3「オリビア」→歌手。4「エド」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My husband and I will visit Los Angeles this weekend. On Saturday, he'll go shopping, and I'll go to the beach. On Sunday, we'll go to a museum together.

questions.question: Where will the woman go on Saturday?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「博物館」→日曜。2「ビーチ」→正解。3「買い物」→夫。4「レストラン」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I often help my parents. I give milk to our cat every day, and I cook dinner twice a week. I also clean the bathroom once a week.

questions.question: How often does the boy clean the bathroom?
highlights: clean the bathroom once a week
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「週1回」→正解。2「週2回」→夕食。3「毎日」→猫のミルク。4「月1回」→週1回。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Last weekend, my son and I went to a flower festival. We saw many beautiful roses, and we took pictures of them. We had a good time together.

questions.question: What did the woman do last weekend?
questions.explanation: 「花のフェスティバルに行った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「買い物」→フェスティバル。2「フェスティバルに行った」→正解。3「花を植えた」→見た。4「息子を訪ねた」→一緒に行った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: After school, Andy walked to a bookstore. He bought a new comic book. He also looked at the calendars and dictionaries.

questions.question: What did Andy buy?
highlights: He bought a new comic book
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カレンダー」→見ただけ。2「辞書」→見ただけ。3「教科書」→漫画。4「漫画」→正解（答え番号3）。
